summary: Placeholder review lane added during generation-system hardening. The coverage-repair slice contains useful triage records, but extraction fidelity has not been independently cleared.

findings.claim_or_issue: Several human study outcomes and results remain triage summaries rather than source-located extraction-grade records.
findings.why_it_matters: A living evidence system needs exact endpoint definitions, comparator details, quantitative effects, uncertainty, and source locators before records can be promoted or synthesized.
findings.recommended_action: Run extraction-refresh passes for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk studies, then reconcile the D+Q bone RCT against publication tables and supplements.
